name: agenttool-collab
description: Local advisory sessions, task leases, handoffs, and evidence for simultaneous agents

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate parallel agents with advisory local leases.
interface.longDescription: Adds a local SQLite coordination journal and an evidence-labelled workflow for cross-host sessions, task claims, path scopes, progress, decisions, artifacts, and refusable handoffs. Presence and capabilities are self-declared routing hints, completion remains actor-reported, and Codex still spawns and steers agents.
defaultPrompt: Coordinate this parallel coding task locally.
Show my next claimed or ready tasks.
Set up advisory path scopes for these subagents.
